title: verbascum × mutense
intro: Verbascum × mutense is a hybrid plant, derived from the Verbascum genus, commonly known as mullein. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain mucilage, a soothing agent that can help to reduce inflammation and irritation. The health benefits of Verbascum × mutense include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Verbascum × mutense can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
